risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Project Implementation
risk_summary: The project faces substantial political and governance risks that have been consistently rated as 'Substantial' since approval. These risks are affecting implementation timelines and the ability to achieve certain targets, particularly under Component 2 (informal sector skills development).
evidence_quote: Political and Governance Substantial Substantial Substantial [Risk Category Rating at Approval, Last Approved Rating, and Proposed Rating all marked as Substantial]

risk_title: Delays in Component 2 Implementation Linked to Governance Challenges
risk_summary: Component 2 activities have experienced delays in finalizing selection processes and contracting with Training Service Providers (TSPs), with slow progress on impact evaluation surveys. These delays suggest governance and institutional capacity constraints affecting implementation.
evidence_quote: Sub component 2.2a - Following the completion of the training for Master craft persons and apprentices, slow progress has been made in finalizing the selection of the firm for the follow-up impact evaluation survey to assess the effectiveness of the training received.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints Affecting NYESAF Implementation and Target Achievement
risk_summary: The Nigerian Youth Employment Skills Acquisition Fund (NYESAF) implementation is lagging significantly, with enrollment and completion targets unlikely to be achieved by project closing. This reflects underlying institutional capacity and governance challenges in managing results-based contracting.
evidence_quote: Number of youth who enrolled in a results-based and demand-driven skills training (Number, cumulated) (Number) Comments on achieving targets: This is number of trainees enrolled under the first batch of NYESAF. End target not likely to be achieved by project closing date
